error.message: The parameters dictionary contains a null entry for parameter 'protocolId' of non-nullable type 'System.Int32' for method 'System.Web.Mvc.ActionResult GetTouchPointWithTitleByprotocolId(Int32)' in 'Generic.Controllers.TouchpointController'. An optional parameter must be a reference type, a nullable type, or be declared as an optional parameter. Parameter name: parameters
error.detail: System.ArgumentException: The parameters dictionary contains a null entry for parameter 'protocolId' of non-nullable type 'System.Int32' for method 'System.Web.Mvc.ActionResult GetTouchPointWithTitleByprotocolId(Int32)' in 'Generic.Controllers.TouchpointController'. An optional parameter must be a reference type, a nullable type, or be declared as an optional parameter.
